content_body:
- We had a fabulous time! Great place to spend a weekend with friends who are like family. Happy Birthday Kerri! 

- This was the perfect setting for a wonderful weekend with great friends! The view is amazing and the house was outfitted so well for celebrating. Thanks for sharing your getaway with us! 

- Such a beautiful place to spend an absolutely perfect weekend. We enjoyed friends and loved our time together.

- Best birthday weekend ever! Thanks for such a beautiful weekend. This house is absolutely amazing. Friends, family, love, and Blue Ridge have made turning 33 fantastic!
title: Multiple Testimonies from a Birthday Weekend in Blue Ridge
